question.string: How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P3975 wd:Q384908 .
  FILTER (?item != wd:Q765165) .
  ?item wdt:P569 ?birth .
  wd:Q765165 wdt:P569 ?brezhnevBirth .
  FILTER (?birth < ?brezhnevBirth)
}

question.string: How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?president p:P35 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P35 ?position .
  FILTER (?position = wd:Q11696) .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  FILTER (?startDate > "1990-01-01"^^xsd:date)
}

question.string: Did adam ondra win a medal in the 2020 summer olympics?
Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?team ?seasonCount
WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q1427015 .
  ?team wdt:P5138 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P3450 wd:Q18156668 .
  ?team wdt:P2522 ?championship .
  ?championship wdt:P3450 wd:Q18156668 .
  {
    SELECT ?team (COUNT(DISTINCT ?season) AS ?seasonCount)
    WHERE {
      ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q1427015 .
      ?team wdt:P5138 ?season .
      ?season wdt:P3450 wd:Q18156668 .
      ?team wdt:P2522 ?championship .
      ?championship wdt:P3450 wd:Q18156668 .
      FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?team), "Chicago_Bulls"))
    }
    GROUP BY ?team
  }
  FILTER(?seasonCount >= 2)
}

question.string: Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?
Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?start ?end
WHERE {
  wd:Q36159 p:P54 ?memberStatement1 .
  ?memberStatement1 ps:P54 wd:Q127847 .
  ?memberStatement1 pq:P580 ?start .
  wd:Q25369 p:P54 ?memberStatement2 .
  ?memberStatement2 ps:P54 wd:Q127847 .
  ?memberStatement2 pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER (?start <= ?end)
}

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?
Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?founder wdt:P112f ?tencent .
  ?tencent wdt:P161 "Tencent" .
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING ((COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder)) > 1)

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q190475 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?
Does the postal code 32423 belong to Minden?
has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?
has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?lifeExpectancy ?nextYear ?nextLifeExpectancy
WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P298 "Iran".
  ?country p:P2250 ?lifeExpectancyStatement.
  ?lifeExpectancyStatement ps:P2250 ?lifeExpectancy.
  ?lifeExpectancyStatement pq:P585 ?year.
  FILTER (?year > "1999-01-01"^^xsd:date)
  ?nextLifeExpectancyStatement ps:P2250 ?nextLifeExpectancy.
  ?nextLifeExpectancyStatement pq:P585 ?nextYear.
  FILTER (?nextYear = (?year + "P1Y"^^xsd:duration))
  FILTER (?nextLifeExpectancy > ?lifeExpectancy)
}

question.string: has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?population
WHERE {
  wd:Q593 Q1082 ?populationStatement .
  ?populationStatement pq:P585 ?year .
  FILTER (?year > "2006-01-01"^^xsd:date)
  ?populationStatement ps:P1082 ?population .
  FILTER (?population > 1586204)
}

if someone died in 1969, is there any chance they heard of queen’s music?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?person ?queenMusic
WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P570 ?dateOfDeath .
  FILTER(YEAR(?dateOfDeath) = 1969) .
  ?queenMusic wdt:P406 ?soundtrack .
  FILTER(EXISTS { ?queenMusic wdt:P9899 wd:Q465 } || EXISTS { ?queenMusic wdt:P6439 ?lyrics }) .
  BIND(YEAR(?dateOfDeath) < 1969 AS ?possibleToHear) .
  FILTER(?possibleToHear = FALSE) .
}

question.string: in which language does the united stated have the shortest short name?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?lang ?langLabel (MIN(LENGTH(?shortName)) AS ?minLength)
WHERE
{
  wd:Q30 wdt:P1813 ?shortName .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?shortName), ?langCode)) .
  BIND(LANG(?shortName) AS ?lang) .
  BIND(?langCode AS ?lang) .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}
GROUP BY ?lang ?langLabel
ORDER BY ?minLength
LIMIT 1

  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q7889 .
  FILTER (?game != wd:Q24514682)
}
